body:
Ravi, thanks for the note — good to reconnect after the [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) summit last month. I've been thinking more about what you flagged regarding grid-edge compute and I think you're right that the opportunity is moving faster than most people in our circles are pricing in. We've been doing some quiet digging on a few companies at the intersection of demand-response and AI inference workloads, and honestly the unit economics are starting to look pretty compelling at the seed stage. Would love to grab 30 minutes sometime next week to compare notes — I suspect we're looking at some overlapping deal flow and it's worth being thoughtful about where we each want to lean in versus co-invest. Let me know what your calendar looks like.

Amara
